sections.title: The team behind supa.page
sections.body:
**supa.page** is built by [Max Mealing](https://bonnard.ai). It's the marketing-site product I wanted while running [Bonnard](https://bonnard.ai) — agent-editable, no canvas, no chat UI.

## What we believe

- A landing page should be authorable in JSON.
- The agent in your terminal is the editor.
- Marketing infrastructure shouldn't cost more than the marketing.

See the [docs](/docs) for the full pitch.
